microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized solution**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and **self-service scheduling capabilities** that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned drill execution to a fully scalable, partner-ready delivery model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable validation framework adopted across partner integrations.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring multi-stakeholder technical alignment and solution design.

Accelerated partner enablement through **AI-driven automation**, building an internal AI agent that reduced planning cycle time by 39% and increased drill capacity by 21% — directly expanding the team's ability to support more partner accounts concurrently.
microsoft_2023: Championed **partner enablement** for AI-driven code generation workflows by conducting live technical demos and training sessions that drove adoption across 14 key Azure service teams, saving **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Influenced the ArcGIS-adjacent product roadmap by facilitating **11+ structured user interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly securing prioritization of intent-based YAML generation in the next release cycle.

Improved spatial data integrity and retrieval speed by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform, cutting average lookup time by 83% across internal engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched cloud regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ service teams — directly mirroring partner enablement strategy at scale.

Conducted **solution discovery** with 20+ service teams to quantify 81 hours of manual toil per region launch, then built a strategic roadmap to automate critical deployment paths and present findings to senior leadership as a business value case.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and communicate spatial workflow inefficiencies in a clear visual format.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and presenting the technical solution design to cross-functional stakeholders.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a scalable integration framework across distributed robotics infrastructure.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across a multi-team systems integration program.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals through a restructured CRM process — building the operational foundation for scalable business development and partner-facing solution delivery.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile to communicate solution value to non-technical and technical audiences alike.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify and close margin leaks, presenting findings as a structured business value case to inform strategic planning decisions.

tailoring_notes: 'Partner enablement' (JD: 'plan and execute partner enablement strategies') woven into microsoft_ft bullet#5 and microsoft_2023 bullet#1 to directly mirror Esri's partnership language.

'Solution design' and 'business value' (JD: 'craft and propose solutions that clarify how GIS brings business value') surfaced in microsoft_2022 bullet#2 and pro_painters bullet#1 to frame discovery and consulting work in Esri's framing.

'Technical demonstrations' and 'non-technical partners' (JD: 'design presentations for technical and non-technical partners') echoed in pro_painters bullet#2 and microsoft_2023 bullet#1 to highlight Cyrus's range as a communicator.

'Integration' and 'system architecture' (JD recommended: 'integrating software solutions with other business systems including BI, CRM, ERP') referenced in microsoft_2022 bullet#3 (Power BI/BI) and amazon_robotics bullet#2 (CI/CD integration framework).
microsoft_ft bullet#4 uses 'sovereign-cloud network isolation' to signal IT-context ArcGIS deployment awareness (JD: 'ArcGIS from an IT context — security, networking, cloud computing').
